Container:
nhentai_archivist ghcr.io/9-fs/nhentai_archivist:latest https://github.com/9-FS/nhentai_archivist/pkgs/container/nhentai_archivist bridge
bash false https://github.com/9-FS/nhentai_archivist/issues https://github.com/9-FS/nhentai_archivist Unraid template for 9-FS/nhentai_archivist Advanced options for .env: https://github.com/9-FS/nhentai_archivist/blob/main/readme.md#further-settings # nhentai_archivist > [!WARNING] > I advise against running multiple instances of nHentai Archivist at the same time. ## Installation
1. Execute the program once to create a default `./config/.env`. This means that in the directory of the executable, there should now be a directory called "config" containing a file called ".env". You might need to enable seeing hidden files in the file explorer.
2. I recommend setting the `CSRFTOKEN` cookie and `USER_AGENT`. If you start having problems with nHentai's bot protection (error 403), setting these is mandatory. If a `CF_CLEARANCE` cookie is available, it should be set as well. - Mozilla Firefox 1. Go to https://nhentai.net/. Clear the Cloudflare prompt. 2 Open the developer console with F12. 3. Go to the tab "Storage". On the left side expand "Cookies". Click on "https://nhentai.net". 4. Copy the cookie values into `./config/.env`. 5. Go to https://www.whatismybrowser.com/detect/what-is-my-user-agent/ and copy your user agent into `./config/.env`. - Google Chrome 1. Go to https://nhentai.net/. Clear the cloudflare prompt. 2. Open the developer console with F12. 3. Go to the tab "Application". On the left side under "Storage", expand "Cookies". Click on "https://nhentai.net". 4. Copy the cookie values into `./config/.env`. 5. Go to https://www.whatismybrowser.com/detect/what-is-my-user-agent/ and copy your user agent into `./config/.env`.
> > If nHentai has "under attack" mode enabled, clearing the Cloudflare prompt and updating `CF_CLEARANCE` seem to be required daily.

1732511495
/mnt/user/appdata/nhentai_archivist/db /mnt/user/appdata/nhentai_archivist/log/ 99 100 000 /mnt/user/appdata/nhentai_archivist/config UTC```
Once icon is created I can post submit it. Of course if there are any changes or additions feel free to let me know of anything.
